_comment: Mutation-testing gate for the money-critical commerce paths. Scoped to the fee/escrow/payment DECISION lines (the notification-copy tails of shipListing/confirmListingDelivery/releaseExpiredReservation are deliberately OUT of range — copy, not money logic) so the score measures money-test strength. Ranges: completeListingPurchase+purchaseListing (fee math, ship-by deadline), shipListing capture-vs-dead-auth, confirmListingDelivery capture, releaseExpiredReservation cancel/revert, payCommission+finalizeCommissionPayment. Run: npm run test:mutation. Currently ~92%. break=92 enforces the high-signal floor; residual survivors are fail()/label copy strings, the un-simulatable single-threaded race guard (if(!reverted.length)...), and equivalent initializers (let onboarded=false) — deliberately not chased (would need brittle copy assertions or concurrency).
